questions.question_text_full: Study the given pie chart carefully and answer the question that follows. The given pie chart shows that the number of successful start-ups in different sectors in a particular year. If the total no. of successful start-ups is 2910 the find the number of start-ups in the education and agriculture sectors. (Neglect the decimal part).
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: The height of a cylinder is 20 cm. The lateral surface area is 1760 cm². Its volume is:
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.
